title: Create story pilot customer brief
goal: Produce a clear customer brief that defines audience, outcomes, constraints, and quality bar.

steps.text: Review active cycle brief and customer context.
Define audience, desired reader outcome, and story constraints in plain language.
Confirm scope boundaries and quality criteria for all downstream roles.

acceptanceCriteria: Audience and desired outcome are explicit
Quality bar is clear and reviewable
Artifact is ready for design handoff

verification.text: Confirm customer brief matches cycle objective and constraints
